title: Surgeon Vacancy at Max Healthcare - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Max Healthcare - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Max Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Max Healthcare:
Max Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare!
